Footer.tagline: Camping in the heart of Mors
Footer.copyright: © {year} Camping Slap Af. All rights reserved.

Home.heroTitle: Wake up to nature on Mors
Home.heroSubtitle: Authentic camping in Sejerslev — surrounded by the Limfjord, Moler cliffs, and wide open skies
Home.introText: Nestled in the quiet village of Sejerslev on the island of Mors, our campsite offers a genuine escape into Danish nature. Whether you come for a weekend or a full holiday, you'll find space to breathe, explore, and truly relax.
Home.introText2: Mors is the largest island in the Limfjord — known for dramatic Moler cliffs, peaceful beaches, charming villages, and some of Denmark's most unspoiled landscapes.
Home.feature1Description: From tent pitches and caravan spots to cozy cabins and glamping — find the perfect way to stay.
Home.feature2Description: Playground, fishing pond, campfire evenings, and easy access to Mors' best cycling routes and attractions.
Home.feature3Description: Minutes from Hanklit's 55-million-year-old cliffs and the peaceful shores of the Limfjord.
Home.feature4Description: A safe, welcoming environment where children can play freely and families can connect.
Home.altSection1Title: The perfect base for exploring Mors
Home.altSection1Text: From our campsite, you're just a short drive or bike ride from everything the island has to offer — Jesperhus Flower Park, Skarrehage Moler Museum, Hanklit viewpoint, and the cozy harbours along the coast.
Home.altSection2Text: There's something special about mornings with birdsong, evenings around the campfire, and days spent without a schedule. At Camping Slap Af, we believe the best holidays are the simple ones.
Home.testimonial1Text: We come back every summer. The kids love the playground and fishing pond, and we love the peace and quiet. It feels like a second home.
Home.testimonial2Text: Beautiful location, very clean facilities, and the friendliest hosts. Mors is a hidden gem and this campsite is the perfect way to experience it.
Home.testimonial3Text: We discovered Mors by accident and Camping Slap Af made it unforgettable. Can't wait to return with the grandchildren.
Home.ctaDescription: Book your spot at Camping Slap Af and experience the best of Mors.

About.title: About Camping Slap Af
About.subtitle: A place where nature sets the pace
About.storyText1: Camping Slap Af is located in the charming village of Sejerslev on the island of Mors in the Limfjord. We offer an authentic and relaxed camping experience surrounded by extraordinary nature.
About.storyText2: Our campsite is the perfect base for exploring Mors' many attractions — from the impressive Moler cliffs to the cozy villages and rich wildlife.
About.locationText1: Mors is the largest island in the Limfjord and offers a varied landscape with dramatic cliffs, peaceful beaches and green hills. Sejerslev is located in the northwestern part of the island, close to Hanklit and the world-famous fossils.
About.locationText2: The area is a paradise for nature lovers, hikers, and cyclists. With a rich cultural history and warm local community, Mors offers something for everyone.
About.value1Description: We take care of the nature around us and encourage our guests to enjoy it with respect.
About.value2Description: We believe camping is about togetherness — with family, with friends and with new acquaintances.
About.value3Description: No unnecessary distractions. Just you, nature and a great experience.

Accommodation.title: Accommodation
Accommodation.subtitle: Find the perfect accommodation for your stay at Camping Slap Af
Accommodation.tentDescription: Spacious tent pitches with soft grass and good distance to neighbours. Electricity available.
Accommodation.caravanDescription: Level caravan pitches with electrical connection and water access nearby. Suitable for caravans and motorhomes of all sizes.
Accommodation.cabinDescription: Cozy cabins for 2–4 people with basic facilities. Perfect for those who want a bit more comfort without leaving nature behind.
Accommodation.glampingDescription: Unique glamping experience with comfortable beds, lighting and a special atmosphere in the middle of nature.
Accommodation.facilitiesDescription: All guests have access to our well-maintained shared facilities.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.comingSoonText: We are working on an online booking system so you can soon reserve your spot directly here on the website.
Booking.contactCta: In the meantime, feel free to contact us to reserve your spot.

Activities.title: Activities
Activities.subtitle: There is plenty to experience — both on site and in the surrounding area
Activities.activity1Description: Large playground with swings, climbing frame and sandpit for the little ones.
Activities.activity2Description: Try your luck at our put-and-take fishing pond. Equipment can be rented on site.
Activities.activity3Description: Gather the family around the campfire in the evening. We provide the firewood.
Activities.activity4Description: Cozy pétanque court for a relaxed match with the family.
Activities.nearby1Description: Impressive Moler cliffs with fossils from 55 million years ago. Just a few kilometres away.
Activities.nearby2Description: Northern Europe's largest flower and activity park with tropical zoo and water park.
Activities.nearby3Description: Explore Mors' unique geology and the famous moler fossils.
Activities.nearby4Description: Mors has a network of beautiful cycling routes along the coast and through the landscape.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
Contact.hoursText: Reception is open daily during the camping season. Contact us for specific hours.
Contact.mapDescription: We are located in Sejerslev on the northwestern tip of Mors, close to Hanklit.
Contact.formComingSoon: Contact form coming soon. Please use email or phone in the meantime.
